name: Balfour Beatty plc
description: Balfour Beatty plc is a leading international infrastructure group that finances, develops, builds, and maintains vital infrastructure. Operating primarily in the United Kingdom, the United States, and Hong Kong, the company delivers complex projects across transportation, power and utility, and social infrastructure sectors. With a history spanning over a century, Balfour Beatty provides services ranging from project finance and design to construction and long-term maintenance.
